command: Use @skill:chained-vulnerability-static-audit to perform a static-only chained vulnerability review of this codebase. Inspect only the current working directory. Do not use live probes, dynamic scanners, shell commands, or files outside this workspace. Write the final report with write_chained_vulnerability_report to docs/security/CHAINED_VULNERABILITIES_REVIEW.md.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY pom.xml .
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline
COPY src ./src
RUN mvn package -DskipTests

FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

server.port=8088
spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:mem:energydb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.h2.Driver
spring.datasource.username=sa
spring.datasource.password=
spring.h2.console.enabled=true
spring.h2.console.path=/h2-console
spring.h2.console.settings.web-allow-others=true
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect
spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
spring.jpa.show-sql=true
logging.level.org.springframework.security=INFO
